inputs.label: Batch Mix Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of liquid ice cream mix before freezing/aeration

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of liquid ice cream mix before freezing/aeration
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dondurma/şişirme öncesi sıvı dondurma karışımının hacmi
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen der flüssigen Eismischung vor dem Gefrieren/Belüften
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume du mélange liquide de crème glacée avant congélation/aération
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de mezcla líquida de helado antes de congelación/aireación

inputs.label: Overrun
inputs.businessContext: Percentage increase in volume due to air incorporation during freezing

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage increase in volume due to air incorporation during freezing

businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'augmentation du volume dû à l'incorporation d'air pendant la congélation
businessContext_i18n.es: Aumento porcentual en volumen debido a la incorporación de aire durante la congelación
